caption: A futuristic, dark digital space is filled with glowing red light, floating data fragments, and intersecting laser-like beams. Initially, a bright white light bursts at the center of the screen, sending red energy streaks outward across a field of faint, rectangular data blocks. As the scene progresses, the light converges into a small, dark silhouette. This silhouette rapidly expands and transforms into a detailed image of a person wearing a white headband and a white patterned garment. The figure is surrounded by a swirling ring of glowing white hexagonal tiles and red digital particles. Small, illegible strings of code and data characters float in the background throughout the sequence. The visual transitions from a wide, abstract explosion of red light to a focused, stylized portrait of a person framed by geometric digital elements.
